title: Sausage and Pepper Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful skillet dish loaded with sausage, peppers, and onions. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Spicy sausage
ingredients.notes: Use a mild or medium-spicy sausage for a less intense flavor

ingredients.name: Mellow onion
ingredients.notes: Chop the onion into medium-sized pieces for even cooking

ingredients.name: German bell pepper
ingredients.notes: Use any color bell pepper you prefer

ingredients.name: Skillet
ingredients.notes: A large cast-iron or stainless steel skillet is ideal for this recipe

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Season with salt to bring out the flavors

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Add a few grinds of black pepper for added depth

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a good quality olive oil for best flavor

instructions: Heat the olive oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
